title: Crystal Macro Mod
description: Automatically places and breakes Crystals for you, with adjustable settings. NOTE: THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED FOR BREAKING ANY SERVER RULES
body:
**Crystal Macro Mod вЂ“ Advanced Crystal PvP Automation**

Crystal Macro Mod is a lightweight, high-performance crystal PvP utility designed for competitive PvP servers and practice environments. It provides precise control over end crystal placement and destruction while maintaining full stability during intense combat sessions.

Built for Fabric, this mod runs smoothly without causing lag, crashes, or desynchronization вЂ” even during extended PvP encounters.

вљ пёЏ This mod uses doAttack/doItemUse simulation for seamless integration with Minecraft's native input system.

рџ“Њ Note: This mod is intended for use in environments where macros and automation tools are permitted. It is not designed or intended for breaking server rules, bypassing anti-cheat systems, or gaining an unfair advantage on servers that prohibit such tools. Always check and respect the rules of the server you are playing on. The developer assumes no responsibility for misuse.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вњЁ Features
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

рџЋ® Crystal Macro
- Automatically places and breaks end crystals
- Targets obsidian and bedrock surfaces for placement
- Randomized attack and place delays for natural behavior
- Pause after nearby player kill to avoid suspicion
- Hold right-click to activate вЂ” release to stop

вљ”пёЏ Break Only Mode
- Separate module from Crystal Macro
- Automatically breaks any end crystal you look at
- You place crystals manually вЂ” mod only handles destruction
- Independent toggle вЂ” does not require Crystal Macro to be active
- Adjustable break delay

рџ–ҐпёЏ Clean GUI
- Scrollable settings menu with modern dark theme
- Purple accent design with smooth animations
- Section dividers for organized layout
- Keybind rebinding directly from the GUI
- Compact HUD overlay showing macro status

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вЊЁпёЏ Hotkeys & Controls
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

J вЂ” Toggle Crystal Macro on/off
K вЂ” Open/close settings menu

вљ пёЏ Keybinds are fully rebindable from the settings menu. Make sure they do not conflict with other mods or Minecraft controls.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ› пёЏ How to Use
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

1. Launch Minecraft with Fabric.
2. Ensure there are no keybind conflicts.
3. Press K in-game to open the settings menu.
4. Enable Crystal Macro or Break Only Mode.
5. Configure delays and pause settings to your preference.
6. Hold end crystals in your main hand or offhand.
7. Hold right-click while looking at obsidian or bedrock вЂ” the macro handles the rest.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вљ™пёЏ Settings Overview
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

Crystal Macro
- Crystal Macro вЂ” Enable/disable the full place and break cycle
- Stop on Kill вЂ” Pause the macro when a nearby player dies
- Pause After Kill вЂ” Duration to pause after a kill (0вЂ“5000ms)
- Attack Delay Min вЂ” Minimum ticks between crystal attacks (0вЂ“10)
- Attack Delay Max вЂ” Maximum ticks between crystal attacks (0вЂ“10)
- Place Delay вЂ” Ticks between crystal placements (0вЂ“10)

Break Only Mode
- Break Only Mode вЂ” Enable/disable automatic crystal breaking
- Break Delay вЂ” Ticks between breaks (0вЂ“10)

Settings
- Show HUD вЂ” Toggle the compact status overlay
- Toggle Key вЂ” Rebind the macro toggle key
- GUI Key вЂ” Rebind the settings menu key

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“¦ Requirements
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

- Minecraft (Fabric)
- Fabric Loader
- No Fabric API required вЂ” fully standalone

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“‹ Defaults
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

- Pause After Kill вЂ” 1000ms
- Attack Delay Min вЂ” 1 tick
- Attack Delay Max вЂ” 1 tick
- Place Delay вЂ” 0 ticks
- Break Delay вЂ” 1 tick

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
